headline: Wells Fargo revamps Nvidia stock price target ahead of earnings
summary: Aaron Rakers has covered Nvidia for years. He ranks in the top 1% of Wall Street analysts by performance. And when he builds a new model from scratch to justify a price target, the reasoning behind it is worth understanding. He just did exactly that. And the number he landed on is not what most ...

headline: Wells Fargo Set for 16% Upside Despite Recent Selloff

headline: How The Amphastar Pharmaceuticals (AMPH) Narrative Is Shifting As Targets Fall And New Drugs Launch
summary: The analyst modeled fair value for Amphastar Pharmaceuticals was trimmed from US$28.00 to about US$26.86, pointing to a slightly lower price target being used in current research. Recent commentary links these moves to more cautious views on revenue guidance and execution, even as AMP-015 and AMP-007 win approvals and keep some analysts constructive on the stock. In the sections that follow, you will see how this evolving narrative is shaping expectations and what it may mean for your own...

headline: Wells Fargo Hikes NVIDIA Price Target to $315 Ahead of Earnings: Is the AI King Still Cheap at 20x P/E?
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) stock just earned a fresh endorsement from Wells Fargo, which raised its price target to $315 from $265 and reiterated its Overweight rating on NVIDIA. The price target raise lands just eight days before NVIDIA’s quarterly report on May 20, with the firm arguing the stock still trades at less than 20 times ... headline: How The PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) Story Is Evolving As Analysts Rework Expectations
summary: The fair value estimate for PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust has been trimmed from US$13.43 to US$13.14 per share, a modest cut that reflects recent tweaks to analysts’ models rather than a sweeping overhaul. Several firms are pairing these reductions of roughly US$0.30 to US$1.00 per share with more neutral ratings as they reassess how much optimism to keep around earnings power and what investors may be willing to pay. Read on to see how these shifting targets fit into the broader story...

headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Himadri Speciality Chemical (BSE:500184)
summary: Himadri Speciality Chemical is back on investor radars after analysts lifted their fair value estimate for the stock from ₹470 to ₹550. This change is being framed as a recalibration of the valuation framework, with new commentary focused on how updated assumptions might shift the risk and reward balance for shareholders. Read on to see what this evolving narrative could mean for how you track the stock from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our...
